text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I enter this modern, well-lit space. The glass doors separate the quiet corridor from a vibrant display inside. Stepping in, philosophical curiosity stirs: the R+D exhibit draws me as a testament to human ingenuity and our evolving relationship with technology. I am both the observer and the participant in this dance of ideas, confronted by questions of how we coexist with machines and what it means for progress and self-understanding. There is excitement in the air—a feeling of standing at the intersection of innovation and reflection.
